## Question

Please ask one clear public-safe question.

## Context

Which public page or document is your question about?

- [ ] README
- [ ] Public current status
- [ ] Public boundaries
- [ ] Public Body Shadow checks
- [ ] Public engineering contracts
- [ ] Public memory/residue boundaries
- [ ] First public demo plan
- [ ] Demo spec
- [ ] Review questions
- [ ] Other:

## What kind of answer would help?

- [ ] short clarification
- [ ] link to an existing document
- [ ] wording improvement
- [ ] review suggestion
- [ ] explanation of a boundary
- [ ] suggestion for a public artifact

## Boundary note

This repository is public-facing.

Please keep questions focused on the public notes, demo/artifact planning, review direction, and public-safe boundaries.

Please do not ask for or include:

- private workbench files;
- raw logs;
- local paths;
- unpublished notes;
- private implementation details;
- internal report filenames;
- protected hashes;
- private owner paths;
- private schema details;
- hidden channels;
- private runtime traces.

Please also avoid treating static/shadow evidence as live behavior, actual selected results, memory authority, speech authority, consciousness, life, or a finished autonomous system.
